arts.ttl: Serie A | Genoa v Monza: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Genoa's injury woes are easing as they prepare to face Monza in Serie A on Monday evening. Portuguese forward Vitinha and captain Milan Badelj have resumed training and could make the matchday squad. Brooke Norton-Cuffy and Caleb Ekuban are also available for selection. The post Serie A | Genoa v Monza: Probable starting lineups appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Serie A | Genoa v Monza: Match Preview
arts.sum: As the Serie A season approaches its midway point, Genoa and Monza prepare to face off in a match with significant implications for both sides. The encounter at Stadio Luigi Ferraris on Monday evening pits a resurgent Genoa against a struggling Monza side desperate to climb off the foot of the table.
